messages.content: I need a Python email validator function and a password hasher function

plan.description: Create email_validator.py with function skeleton that accepts string input and returns boolean, handling empty strings and None values

interface.name: validate_email_format
interface.description: Validate email format by checking for a single '@' symbol in the string. Handles empty strings and None values.

plan.description: Implement basic email format validation (local-part@domain) and check for multiple @ symbols

interface.name: validate_email_parts
interface.description: Split email into local-part and domain, validate allowed characters in both sections. Check for multiple @ symbols.

plan.description: Add validation for invalid characters in email address and ensure domain has at least one dot after @ symbol

interface.name: validate_email_with_tld
interface.description: Validate email format with optional TLD validation against a list of common top-level domains (com, org, net, etc.). Add validation for invalid characters and ensure domain has at least one dot after @ symbol.

plan.description: Create comprehensive unit tests for email validator covering valid and invalid cases

interface.name: test_email_validator
interface.description: Create comprehensive unit tests for email validator covering valid and invalid cases.

plan.description: Create password_hasher.py with function skeleton for hashing passwords using SHA-256 with salt generation

interface.name: hash_password
interface.description: Create function skeleton for hashing passwords using SHA-256 with salt generation. Returns tuple of (hash, salt).

plan.description: Implement secure password hashing function with salt generation and handle empty password strings

interface.name: hash_password_secure
interface.description: Implement secure password hashing function with salt generation and handle empty password strings. Returns tuple of (hash, salt).

plan.description: Add password verification function to compare plain text password against stored hash

interface.name: verify_password
interface.description: Add password verification function to compare plain text password against stored hash.

plan.description: Implement error handling for invalid inputs in both hashing and verification functions

interface.name: hash_password_with_validation
interface.description: Implement error handling for invalid inputs in both hashing and verification functions. Returns tuple of (hash, salt).

plan.description: Create comprehensive unit tests for password hasher covering hashing, verification, and error cases

interface.name: test_password_hasher
interface.description: Create comprehensive unit tests for password hasher covering hashing, verification, and error cases.

requirements.title: Email Validator Function
requirements.description: Create a Python function that validates email addresses according to standard email format rules and common validation patterns.
acceptance_criteria: Function accepts a string input and returns a boolean indicating validity
Checks for common invalid patterns (multiple @ symbols, invalid characters)
Validates domain has at least one dot after @ symbol
Returns False for empty strings or None values
Includes comprehensive unit tests covering valid and invalid cases

requirements.title: Password Hasher Function
requirements.description: Create a Python function that securely hashes passwords using industry-standard cryptographic algorithms.
acceptance_criteria: Function accepts a plain text password string and returns a hashed string
Uses secure hashing algorithm (SHA-256 or bcrypt recommended)
Includes salt generation for each hash to prevent rainbow table attacks
Provides option to verify password against hash (verify function)
Includes error handling for invalid inputs
Includes comprehensive unit tests for hashing and verification

current_step_title: Implement error handling for invalid inputs in both hashing and verification functions
last_error_message: Pending steps are blocked by unsatisfied dependencies.
progress_text: Pending steps are blocked by unsatisfied dependencies.
last_action_summary: Implement step R002-S04 in password_hasher.py for interface hash_password_with_validation.

pending_approvals.description: Plan is ready. Approve to start execution.
